rigor.method: exact invisibility bound: a char-0 plane with >= 7 incidences fixes three nonzero integers D_bc, D_ad <= 3^(3m/2), D_det <= 54^m (norms of cross-product coordinates / determinant); invisibility at a clean split prime p > 2^28 forces p to divide one of them; capacity pigeonhole gives ladder length k(n) = 2*cap(3^(3m/2)) + cap(54^m) + 1; see RESULTS-CHAR0-RIGOR.md
